sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: PFFA ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns AMEX:PFFA
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of the Virtus InfraCap U.S. Preferred Stock ETF (PFFA), focusing on its dividends and returns. It details the fund's active management strategy, including its use of leverage, and provides key statistics such as AUM, dividend yield, and expense ratio. The article also addresses frequently asked questions about the ETF's holdings, dividend growth, and performance.

feed.title: Li Auto Announces Put Right Option for 0.25% Convertible Senior Notes Due 2028
feed.summary: Li Auto Inc. has announced a put right option for its 0.25% Convertible Senior Notes due in 2028, allowing noteholders to require the company to repurchase their notes on April 15, 2026. The repurchase price will be 100% of the principal amount plus accrued and unpaid interest. Noteholders must submit their requests between March 17, 2026, and April 14, 2026, following the procedures outlined in the notes' indenture.

feed.title: Lattice Semiconductor Adjusts Financial Metrics Amid Mixed Market Signals and Valuation Changes
feed.summary: Lattice Semiconductor Corp. has seen its financial metrics adjusted, leading to a score revision. While technical indicators show a mixed outlook with some bullish signals and some cautious ones, its valuation has moved from "very expensive" to "fair," despite high P/E and Price to Book Value ratios. Despite facing negative financial performance for five consecutive quarters, the company has outperformed the S&P 500, delivering a 60.48% market return over the past year.

feed.title: VeriSign, Inc. (NASDAQ:VRSN) Receives Average Rating of "Hold" from Analysts

feed.title: BMO Capital Adjusts PT on Targa Resources to $271 From $241, Maintains Outperform Rating

feed.title: Limbach Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:LMB) Given Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages

feed.title: Is Raymond James Financial (RJF) Pricing Reflect Its Recent Share Pullback And Growth Record
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial (RJF) stock is currently priced at US$144.20, showing a recent decline over shorter periods but strong long-term gains. Analysis using the Excess Returns model and Price-to-Earnings ratio suggests the stock is undervalued, with the Excess Returns model indicating a 41.5% discount and the P/E ratio being below both industry averages and Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio. The article encourages investors to leverage Simply Wall St's "Narratives" feature for a more personalized valuation based on their assumptions.

feed.title: LENZ Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:LENZ) Analysts Are Cutting Their Estimates: Here's What You Need To Know
feed.summary: LENZ Therapeutics (NASDAQ:LENZ) recently released its yearly report, revealing revenues of US$19m, missing analyst predictions, and a statutory loss of US$2.85 per share, exceeding forecasts. Analysts have since cut next year's revenue estimates to US$30.3m and increased loss per share forecasts to US$3.62, leading to a 13% drop in the consensus price target to US$44.43. Despite the downgraded outlook, the company is still expected to experience revenue growth significantly faster than the broader industry.

feed.title: Kepco, KHNP reportedly agree to resolve UAE plant project dispute at home
feed.summary: Korea Electric Power Corporation (Kepco) and Korea Hydro & Nuclear Power (KHNP) have reportedly agreed to resolve their legal dispute concerning payments for the UAE power plant project domestically. This decision follows a request from the Ministry of Trade, Industry and Resources, aiming to avoid international arbitration, reduce costs, and prevent potential leaks of nuclear technology. The dispute arose from additional construction costs for the Barakah nuclear power plant, with KHNP filing a claim against Kepco for reimbursement.

feed.title: NatWest Group plc Sells 3,591 Shares of Intuit Inc. $INTU

feed.title: IQVIA Holdings Inc Stock: Business Model Strength and Analyst Upgrades Signal Investor Opportunities
feed.summary: IQVIA Holdings Inc (IQV) is highlighted as a global leader in healthcare intelligence, benefiting from a recent Barclays upgrade to overweight with a $210 target price. The company's strong business model leverages vast datasets and AI-driven insights in clinical research and R&D solutions, positioning it well amid rising demand for real-world evidence and personalized medicine. North American investors are encouraged to consider IQV for its resilient healthcare exposure and predictable cash flows, despite risks related to data privacy and client concentration.

feed.title: UK watchdog probes $3.4 billion Suzano and Kimberly-Clark deal
feed.summary: Britain's Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) has initiated a phase 1 investigation into the $3.4 billion joint venture between Brazilian pulp producer Suzano and consumer goods giant Kimberly-Clark. The CMA has set a deadline of May 28 to announce its decision from this initial probe.

feed.title: FAA Probing Close Call Between Black Hawk Helicopter, Boeing 737 Operated By United Airlines
feed.summary: The FAA is investigating a recent close call between an Army Black Hawk helicopter and a United Airlines Boeing 737 near John Wayne Airport in Santa Ana. This incident follows a fatal collision last year involving an American Airlines regional jet and a Black Hawk. The FAA is also examining whether new visual separation restrictions were in place during the latest event.

feed.title: Micron steadies after 23% slide as investors weigh Trump's “hottest company” remark (MU:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Micron Technology (MU) shares were largely stable in early premarket trading after experiencing a 23% decline over six sessions. The stabilization comes as investors consider President Donald Trump’s recent remark calling Micron the "hottest company." The stock had previously been under pressure, and markets are now reacting to the implications of Trump's comments.

feed.title: Managed Print Services Market Is Going to Boom |• HP Inc. • Xerox Corporation

feed.title: The Kroger Co Stock: Navigating Grocery Sector Dynamics and AI-Driven Efficiency in 2026
feed.summary: The Kroger Co is leveraging AI and data science, specifically through its 84.51° division, to enhance operational efficiency, inventory management, and forecasting in the competitive grocery sector. The company's focus on private-label brands, store remodels, and a hybrid model of physical stores and digital fulfillment helps it counter competition from discounters and e-commerce giants. Financially, Kroger maintains a strong balance sheet, offers a reliable dividend, and positions itself as a stable holding for North American investors despite ongoing challenges like labor costs and regulatory scrutiny.

feed.title: Apple Confirms End of Mac Pro Line with No Future Models Planned
feed.summary: Apple has officially discontinued its Mac Pro desktop computer, confirming that no future models are planned. The Mac Pro, last updated in 2023 with an M2 Ultra chip, will be replaced as Apple's high-end desktop by the Mac Studio, which features the M3 Ultra chip and is expected to receive an M5 Ultra refresh later in 2026. This move reflects Apple's strategy to simplify its desktop lineup, focusing on compact, high-performance options like the Mac Studio.

feed.title: Signal Advisors Wealth LLC Boosts Holdings in Procter & Gamble

This move, detailed in a recent SEC filing, suggests the firm's confidence in the consumer goods giant's performance and growth prospects.

feed.title: Form 424B2 CITIGROUP INC
feed.summary: Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc. is offering autocallable equity linked securities with periodic coupon payments linked to the performance of the Nasdaq-100 Index®, Russell 2000® Index, and S&P 500® Index. These securities carry significant risks, including the potential loss of principal if the worst performing underlying falls below its barrier value and the possibility of early redemption. Investors should be aware of the credit risk of Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc. and Citigroup Inc., and that the securities will not be listed on any exchange.

feed.title: Launch Two Acquisition (NASDAQ: LPBB) outlines SPAC trust cash, risks and 2026 deal deadline
feed.summary: Launch Two Acquisition Corp. (LPBB), a SPAC, has detailed its trust account holdings and the deadline for completing a business combination. The company raised $230 million in its IPO and $7.075 million from a private placement, with $231.15 million placed in a trust account, equating to approximately $10.58 per public share as of December 31, 2025. LPBB must finalize an acquisition by October 9, 2026, or liquidate, and the filing emphasizes various risks, including the challenge of finding a suitable target, potential for high redemptions, and broader market disruptions.

feed.title: [EFFECT] Lucid Diagnostics Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article reports on an SEC filing by Lucid Diagnostics Inc. (LUCD). The filing is a Notice of Effectiveness for Form S-3, with an effectiveness date of March 26, 2026, at 4:30 P.M. The article also provides an overview of Lucid Diagnostics Inc., including its market cap, float, industry, and recent news and SEC filings.

feed.title: Have Best Buy Insiders Been Selling Stock?
feed.summary: Best Buy CEO Corie Barry recently sold US$2.7m worth of shares, reducing her holding by 7.5%, while the Founder & Chairman Emeritus, Richard Schulze, made a larger sale of US$39m. Despite these insider sales, Best Buy maintains high insider ownership at 6.9%. The article notes the company's profitability and growth, but expresses caution due to the recent selling activity and lack of insider buying.

feed.title: A Look At LCI Industries (LCII) Valuation After Recent Mixed Share Performance
feed.summary: LCI Industries (LCII) is currently trading at $123.75, showing a 36% intrinsic discount compared to its fair value of $161.33. Despite mixed recent short-term share performance, the company has strong longer-term returns (41.45% over 1 year, 31.07% over 3 years) driven by demand for RVs and aftermarket products, contributing to sustained and recurring revenue streams with higher margins. Investors are encouraged to consider the balance between risk and reward, alongside potential risks like lower-than-expected RV volumes or increased input costs.

feed.title: Hormel Foods Announces Retirement of Richard Carlson, VP of Global Food Safety & Quality Management
feed.summary: Hormel Foods Corporation announced the retirement of Richard Carlson, Vice President of Global Food Safety & Quality Management, after 35 years with the company. Jeremiah Johnson, a 20-year company veteran and director of food safety management, will succeed Carlson in the role. The company is a Fortune 500 global branded food company.

feed.title: Assessing F5 (FFIV) Valuation After Q1 Beat Guidance Raise And New Forcepoint AI Security Alliance
feed.summary: F5 (FFIV) recently exceeded Q1 expectations and raised its guidance, partly due to a new alliance with Forcepoint for AI security. Despite an 11.4% share price increase over three months to US$293.15, the stock is estimated to be 26% undervalued, with a fair value of US$310.30 driven by its AI offerings and partnerships. This valuation depends on F5 maintaining software adoption and competing effectively against cloud giants.

feed.title: Phillips 66 to Pay $8 Million Gets Prosecution Deferred No Monitor No Finding of Guilt No Corporate Probation No Press Release
feed.summary: Phillips 66 settled a criminal indictment for Clean Water Act violations by agreeing to an $8 million payment and a three-year deferred prosecution agreement, with no monitor, no finding of guilt, and no corporate probation. The Department of Justice notably did not issue a press release about this settlement, leading to a lack of public awareness and criticism over the leniency of the deal. Critics argue that the fine is insufficient to deter corporate crime and that the absence of public accountability, like corporate probation or a public trial, sends a wrong message to corporate lawbreakers.

feed.title: Caesars goes live with Aristocrat Interactive content in West Virginia
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment has launched Aristocrat Interactive's online slots in West Virginia, making it the first online casino operator to do so. The rollout includes popular titles such as 5 Dragons and Fu Dai Lian Lian Panda across Caesars Palace Online Casino, Caesars Sportsbook & Casino, and Horseshoe Online Casino. Both companies express excitement about expanding access to familiar slot experiences for players.

feed.title: Legence Corp. Stock Slides After AI Hype Fades

(LGN) stock is experiencing volatility and sliding downward as investors re-evaluate the sustainability of enthusiasm surrounding its AI-focused data center and infrastructure business. feed.title: Here's How Many Shares of AbbVie (ABBV) Stock You'd Need for $10,000 in Yearly Dividends
feed.summary: This article examines how many shares of AbbVie (ABBV) stock an investor would need to purchase to generate $10,000 in annual dividend income. It highlights AbbVie's consistent dividend growth, its strong financial performance despite patent loss for Humira, and its extensive drug pipeline. The article also notes that while Abbvie is a reliable dividend stock, it was not among The Motley Fool's top 10 stock recommendations at the time of publication.
